method: NOAA verified hourly heights; missing hourly anchors use the nearest verified six-minute Lewes observation within 30 minutes when available
usePolicy: Lewes is a pre-2007 Stone Harbor surrogate only; it is never used on or after 2007-10-01

encoding.u: UTC epoch second of the local day's first hourly anchor
encoding.v: NAVD88 feet multiplied by 100; null means NOAA hourly and six-minute data were both unavailable; entries are one UTC hour apart
encoding.p: daily maximum available NAVD88 feet multiplied by 100
encoding.c: daily flood classification using North Wildwood thresholds
encoding.x: indexes in v filled from verified six-minute observations
